arts.ttl: Serie A | Bologna v Como: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season enters a crucial phase, Bologna welcomes Como to Stadio Dall'Ara on Saturday evening in a match that could have significant implications for both teams' aspirations. The hosts, fresh from their Champions League campaign, are pushing for European qualification, while Como are fighting to secure their top-flight status. arts.ttl: Bologna Eye Milan’s Calabria as Potential Defensive Reinforcement
arts.sum: Bologna FC is actively exploring options to strengthen their defensive lineup, with AC Milan's right-back Davide Calabria emerging as a potential target. The Rossoblu have made initial inquiries about the Italian defender, signalling their interest in bolstering their squad.
